title: IT Customer Support Basics
summary: Fundamentals of IT customer support: troubleshooting workflows, communication, and service best practices.
body: Covers the core skills of front-line IT support — diagnosing common hardware and software issues, walking users through fixes, and communicating clearly under pressure. Earned through the Cisco Networking Academy in 2026.

title: Security and Connectivity Support
summary: Supporting secure network connectivity: network fundamentals, security basics, and connectivity troubleshooting.
body: Focuses on keeping users securely connected — network fundamentals, common security threats and mitigations, and systematic troubleshooting of connectivity problems. Earned through the Cisco Networking Academy in 2026.

title: Introduction to Modern AI
summary: Foundations of modern artificial intelligence: core concepts, applications, and responsible use.
body: An introduction to how modern AI systems work and where they are applied — machine learning concepts, practical use cases, and responsible AI considerations. Earned through the Cisco Networking Academy in 2026.

title: Creating Compelling Reports
summary: Creating effective reports: data visualization, storytelling, and actionable insights.
body: Teaches how to turn data into clear, compelling reports — visualizing data effectively, crafting narratives around insights, and presenting findings for decision-making. Earned through the Cisco Networking Academy in 2026.
